task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, number, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

owner is 'demo@example.com'
allow signup and login

# Customers endpoints

when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer:
  requires login
  validate customer:
    name is text, required
    company is text, required
  saved = save customer to Customers
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  onboarding = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back onboarding

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  customer = look up Customer with this id
  send back customer

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  save changes to Customers
  send back 'updated'

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  delete Customer with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# OnboardingSteps endpoints

when user calls POST /api/steps sending step:
  requires login
  validate step:
    step_name is text, required
    customer_id is number, required
  saved = save step to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201
  validate step:
    step_name is text, required
    customer_id is number, required
  validate step:
    step_name is text, required
  saved = save step to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps
  send back steps

when user calls GET /api/steps/:id:
  requires login
  step = look up OnboardingStep with this id
  send back step

when user calls PUT /api/steps/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  save changes to OnboardingSteps
  send back 'updated'

when user calls DELETE /api/steps/:id:
  requires login
  delete OnboardingStep with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# Frontend

page 'App' at '/':
  requires login
  heading 'Customer Onboarding Tracker'
  
  section 'Add Customer':
    name = ''
    company = ''
    'Name' is a text input saved as name
    'Company' is a text input saved as company
    button 'Add Customer':
      send { name, company } as a new record to '/api/customers'
      set name to ''
      set company to ''
  
  section 'Customers':
    on page load get all_customers from '/api/customers'
    display all_customers as table

  section 'Add Step':
    step_name = ''
    customer_id = ''
    'Step Name' is a text input saved as step_name
    'Customer ID' is a number input saved as customer_id
    button 'Add Step':
      send { step_name, customer_id } as a new record to '/api/steps'
      set step_name to ''
      set customer_id to ''
  
  section 'Onboarding Steps':
    on page load get all_steps from '/api/steps'
    display all_steps as table
